test-case.description: returns rows for the canonical 6 agent targets
test-case.name: Get-KritPax8AgentTargets.returns rows for the canonical 6 agent targets

test-case.description: every row has Path Format ConfigExists HostInstalled InstallHint
test-case.name: Get-KritPax8AgentTargets.every row has Path Format ConfigExists HostInstalled InstallHint

test-case.description: writes a JSON config from scratch with pax8 entry containing token header
test-case.name: Write-KritPax8JsonAgentConfig.writes a JSON config from scratch with pax8 entry containing token header

test-case.description: preserves pre-existing unrelated mcpServers entries
test-case.name: Write-KritPax8JsonAgentConfig.preserves pre-existing unrelated mcpServers entries

test-case.description: is idempotent (re-running does not duplicate keys)
test-case.name: Write-KritPax8JsonAgentConfig.is idempotent (re-running does not duplicate keys)

test-case.description: -RemoveOnly strips pax8 + pax8-oauth, leaves others
test-case.name: Write-KritPax8JsonAgentConfig.-RemoveOnly strips pax8 + pax8-oauth, leaves others

test-case.description: appends an [mcp_servers.pax8] block to a fresh toml file
test-case.name: Write-KritPax8TomlAgentConfig.appends an [mcp_servers.pax8] block to a fresh toml file

test-case.description: is idempotent — replaces existing pax8 block without duplicating
test-case.name: Write-KritPax8TomlAgentConfig.is idempotent — replaces existing pax8 block without duplicating

test-case.description: -RemoveOnly strips pax8 block, leaves others
test-case.name: Write-KritPax8TomlAgentConfig.-RemoveOnly strips pax8 block, leaves others

test-case.description: returns the canonical SirJ Deaddrop banner when secrets folder is present
test-case.name: Get-KritPax8Banner.returns the canonical SirJ Deaddrop banner when secrets folder is present

test-case.description: -Compact returns one-line summary
test-case.name: Get-KritPax8Banner.-Compact returns one-line summary

test-case.description: -Title appends a title block when not Compact
test-case.name: Get-KritPax8Banner.-Title appends a title block when not Compact

test-case.description: falls back gracefully when LogoPath does not exist
test-case.name: Get-KritPax8Banner.falls back gracefully when LogoPath does not exist

test-case.description: does not throw
test-case.name: Write-KritPax8Banner.does not throw

test-case.description: compact form does not throw
test-case.name: Write-KritPax8Banner.compact form does not throw

test-case.description: joins SecretsDir + TokenFileName
test-case.name: Get-KritPax8TokenPath.joins SecretsDir + TokenFileName

test-case.description: defaults TokenFileName to pax8-mcpServer-auth.txt
test-case.name: Get-KritPax8TokenPath.defaults TokenFileName to pax8-mcpServer-auth.txt

test-case.description: throws when file missing and -AllowMissing not set
test-case.name: Read-KritPax8Token.throws when file missing and -AllowMissing not set

test-case.description: returns $null when file missing and -AllowMissing set
test-case.name: Read-KritPax8Token.returns $null when file missing and -AllowMissing set

test-case.description: throws when file empty
test-case.name: Read-KritPax8Token.throws when file empty

test-case.description: throws when token shorter than 16 chars
test-case.name: Read-KritPax8Token.throws when token shorter than 16 chars

test-case.description: returns trimmed token when valid
test-case.name: Read-KritPax8Token.returns trimmed token when valid

test-case.description: rejects null + empty + whitespace
test-case.name: Test-KritPax8TokenSane.rejects null + empty + whitespace

test-case.description: rejects too short
test-case.name: Test-KritPax8TokenSane.rejects too short

test-case.description: rejects token containing whitespace
test-case.name: Test-KritPax8TokenSane.rejects token containing whitespace

test-case.description: accepts 36-char alphanumeric (Pax8 legacy shape)
test-case.name: Test-KritPax8TokenSane.accepts 36-char alphanumeric (Pax8 legacy shape)

test-case.description: mcp.pax8.com OAuth metadata is reachable and well-formed
test-case.name: OAuth discovery (no token required).mcp.pax8.com OAuth metadata is reachable and well-formed

test-suite.name: Token-auth MCP path (requires Kritical secrets folder)
test-suite.description: Token-auth MCP path (requires Kritical secrets folder)

test-case.description: initialize handshake returns server name pax8-mcp-server
test-case.name: Token-auth MCP path (requires Kritical secrets folder).initialize handshake returns server name pax8-mcp-server

test-case.description: tools/list returns at least 1 tool
test-case.name: Token-auth MCP path (requires Kritical secrets folder).tools/list returns at least 1 tool

test-case.description: returns a structured result with Gates / Passed / Failed / Total / Ok
test-case.name: Test-KritPax8Mcp comprehensive gate set.returns a structured result with Gates / Passed / Failed / Total / Ok

test-case.description: reports G3 OAuth discovery PASS regardless of token presence
test-case.name: Test-KritPax8Mcp comprehensive gate set.reports G3 OAuth discovery PASS regardless of token presence

test-case.description: reports critical G1-G5 PASS when secrets folder + token present
test-case.name: Test-KritPax8Mcp comprehensive gate set.reports critical G1-G5 PASS when secrets folder + token present
